Alma Kishon"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"page_description__Oh3YI","children":"Located on the historic Ha-Nevi’im Road at the junction of four distinct neighborhoods, the Lev Ram building and the Italian Hospital stand as monumental opposites, both currently are used by the Israeli Ministry of Education. Between them is a piazza, a replica of Siena's famous Piazza del Campo, yet here it remains vacant and severed from the urban fabric.\n\nThe Lev Ram Square project reactivates this dead space by restoring the original topography and introducing eight new entrances. By liberating the ground floors of the Lev Ram building, the intervention creates vibrant public spaces and introduces diverse programming that bridges the Ministry with the surrounding community."}]]}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"page_section__LwSr5","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"page_sectionLabel__2T6eL","children":"Presentation"}],["$","$L10",null,{"pages":[{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-01.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$11"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-02.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$12"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-03.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$13"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-04.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$14"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-05.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$15"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-06.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$16"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-07.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$17"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-08.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$18"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-09.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$19"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-10.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1a"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-11.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1b"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-12.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1c"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-13.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1d"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-14.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1e"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-15.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$1f"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-square/presentation/page-16.jpg","width":1819,"height":1285,"placeholder":"$20"},{"src":"/generated/lev-ram-
